meta.dc:title: Expulsion of political canvassers from premises

section.heading: Expulsion of political canvassers from premises

content.p: Nothing in this article shall prevent the owner of any apartment house, condominium project, mobile home park, or planned unit development from expelling any political canvasser from the property or premises who has engaged in conduct disruptive of the owner's property. Speech by itself shall not be considered disruptive conduct. Disruptive conduct by particular political canvassers shall not be grounds for expelling political canvassers not engaged in such disruptive conduct, nor for preventing future access to political canvassers.
